title: Switchable Fluorescence of Doxorubicin for Label-Free Imaging of Bioorthogonal Drug Release.
author: Uyar TB Wu K He M Khan I Royzen M Yigit MV
content: S-EPMC7397846 PMC7397846 Switchable Fluorescence of Doxorubicin for Label-Free Imaging of Bioorthogonal Drug Release.
